REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-21-2026 Continued To Jun-16-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Tom Martin appeared via zoom for Coleman Damian Drew (administrator).

Discussion was held regarding the administrator, that Mr. Martin has not had any communication with his client, that the property is under construction but has no knowledge of the progress.

The Court vacates sanctions against counsel. Counsel to submit a modified petition two weeks prior to the next calling of this case.

The Court orders the administrator removed.

The Court shall serve notice to the Public Administrator to possibly appoint to fill the vacancy.

The OTA/OSC issued to Counsel is ordered off and the OTA/OSC to administrator is ordered off calendar. All other matter are continued to June 16, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Fajardo. Not reported.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Proof Of The Bond
Off Calendar Mar-24-2026 Continued To Apr-21-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court ordered Adminstrator Coleman Damain Drew to post bond in the amount of $830,000.00 by April 10, 2026. The Court also orders both Thomas G. Martin and Coleman Damian Drew to appear at the April 21, 2026 hearings. The Court further orders Thomas G. Martin and Coleman Damian Drew to show cause why they should not be sanctioned $250.00 each for faiure to comply with the court's prior January 6, 2026 Order to Appear. The matter is continued to April 21, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca. Clerk: A. Datt. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Mar-04-2026 Continued To Apr-21-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Mar-04-2026 Continued To Apr-21-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Daniel Hunt appeared via zoom for Coleman Damian Drew (administrator).

Mr. Hunt stated that they personally served Coleman Drew, and that they will serve him with instructions to appear remotely.

The Court sets bond at $830,000.00.

An Order to Appear and Order to Show Cause will be issued to Coleman Damain Drew (administrator) to appear on April 21, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to show cause as to why he should not be removed as administrator.

All matters are continued to April 21, 2026, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Status on filing proof of bond is also set for March 24, 2026, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

Petitioner requests a continuance to be heard with pending motion to be relieved as counsel.
